Title: Naruto Shippûden: The Movie 3: Inheritors of the Will of Fire
Writer: Junki Takegami, Seth Walther, Masahiro Hikokubo
Actors: Junko Takeuchi, Chie Nakamura, Satoshi Hino
Plot: Four Kekkei Genkai shinobi who have been guarding the Hidden Cloud, Stone, Mist and Sand villages disappear without a trace. The Land of Fire comes under suspicion, as it is the only country to have suffered no losses. Mounting suspicion among the four nations is bringing them to the brink of another Great Ninja War.
